package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_accepts_dto_and_persistence_model_together: Signatures that mix transport DTOs and GORM models in the same service API.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule167NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule167NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule167NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario167Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule167NegativeService, input Rule167NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
